scope.summary: A1a closes the fail-open VPD and virtual-column catalog gates by requiring positive catalog visibility before empty probes can certify read-only purity.
out_of_scope: A1e VPD/RLS doctor and query-result visibility diagnostics.
A3a/A3b DBMS_FLASHBACK capability preflight and teardown-quarantine behavior.
Workspace-wide formatting or full workspace gates in the shared dirty checkout.

entry_points.name: D4 fixture provisioning
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180 bash scripts/rig/oracle_l1.sh privilege-matrix --log` exited 0 in the shared checkout: the rig verified exactly one enabled SELECT VPD policy and one virtual column on ORACLEMCP_D4_OWNER.ORACLEMCP_D4_GUARDED and emitted ORACLEMCP_D4_CATALOG_OBJECT_ID=126290.

entry_points.name: A1a-only resolver unit module
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --lib catalog_resolver::tests -- --nocapture` exited 0 in the clean A1a worktree at fa93e169: 17 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored; C8 blind-catalog and sighted-clean-table assertions both passed.

entry_points.name: D4 catalog-blind live twin
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target ORACLEMCP_D4_* cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --features live-xe --test privilege_matrix_live d4_catalog_blind_principal_cannot_prove_the_known_guarded_table_read_only -- --nocapture` exited 0 in the clean A1a worktree at fa93e169: the unignored live D4 catalog-blind case passed against //localhost:1522/FREEPDB1.

entry_points.name: DB package formatting
entry_points.trace: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo fmt --package oraclemcp-db --check` exited 0 in the clean A1a worktree before commit.

entry_points.name: Committed path boundary
entry_points.trace: `git commit -m "fix(db): fail closed on blind catalog gates" -- crates/oraclemcp-db/src/catalog_resolver.rs crates/oraclemcp-db/tests/privilege_matrix_live.rs` created fa93e169 with exactly those two paths: 50 insertions and 7 deletions.

limitations: The shared checkout remained dirty with other agents' work; the A1a commit and evidence were produced from a clean temporary worktree rooted at the pre-A1a main SHA, then main was fast-forwarded to that commit.

The no-flashback D4 case remains ignored and red for the separate A3a/A3b DBMS_FLASHBACK cleanup-quarantine defect; running it with --ignored still fails with DBMS_FLASHBACK.DISABLE PLS-00201 and unknown_discarded quarantine.
The full workspace fmt/check/test gates were not claimed because unrelated dirty shared-checkout work is currently red for formatting outside A1a.

known_defects.description: A principal without EXECUTE ON DBMS_FLASHBACK is still quarantined after DBMS_FLASHBACK.DISABLE cleanup fails; A3a/A3b own that fix.
